name: Cameo P6
comment:
High Output Full-Spectrum Zoom-Profiler with RGBACL LED-Engine.
16.000 lm to replace 2,5KW Halogen, CRI > 97Ra, CCT 1800-10.000K, 600W, 5°-50°.
Color presets: Lee xy at Discharge Lamp.
